chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional & Electronics Support Groups /share/b/pub/alice.help Nov 7, 2001 Alice 99 is a free 3D Graphics authoring tool

01 Alice 99 is a free 3D Graphics authoring tool for MS Windows systems with a plug-in for WEB browsers. It was developed at the University of Virginia and Carnegie Mellon University. It can be downloaded from http://www.alice.org/. Alice 99 is

ownloaded from http://www.alice.org/. Alice 99 is installed for CS39G and other EECS Instructional useds on several Windows 2000 systems in 330 Soda. The instructor of any EECS course can request Win2K accounts for the students so they can run t
Win2K accounts for the students so they can run this software. Questions to "inst@eecs.berkeley.edu". EECS Instructional Support 384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley
